title: RuleBasedProperties
description: An object which defines the list of matching rules to run and has a field Rules, which is a list of rule objects.

allOf.description: You can either choose ONE_TO_ONE or MANY_TO_MANY as the AttributeMatchingModel. When choosing MANY_TO_MANY, the system can match attribute across the sub-types of an attribute type. For example, if the value of the Email field of Profile A and the value of BusinessEmail field of Profile B matches, the two profiles are matched on the Email type. When choosing ONE_TO_ONE the system can only match if the sub-types are exact matches. For example, only when the value of the Email field of Profile A and the value of the Email field of Profile B matches, the two profiles are matched on the Email type.
A list of Rule objects, each of which have fields RuleName and MatchingKeys.
